website.siteDescription: WE ARE STILL HERE. We are the People of the Inside, dxʷdəwʔabš, the Duwamish Tribe. We are the first people of Seattle and Greater King County.

storeSettings.returnPolicy: Sales are final, but we want to make sure you’re happy with your purchase. We will replace damaged or missing items.

localizedStrings.noUpcomingEvents: There are no upcoming events at this time.

items.title: Eco-Tour
items.body:
The Duwamish Tribe offers free, 1-hour guided Eco-Tours through həʔapus Village Park and Shoreline Habitat. The tours start at the Duwamish Longhouse (4705 W Marginal Way SW) and explore the history of the river, native plants, and the Duwamish people's enduring connection to the land. Reserve your spot for this tour. Please arrive a few minutes early to sign your participant waiver and meet your guide at the Duwamish Longhouse.

reserve a spot
